heading: Bubl
overview: Number of BUBL created so far, 550+.
The sole purpose of exploring answers in the quickest way possible, allowing the patient to search instantly for relevant bubls and view his/her own created bubls.
React to bubls in a pop-up UI
Allowing patients to give bubl a name and add its description to let other patients know what it is about.
Allowing patients to view comment icon and a count of the number of comments that have been added to it.
